# DESCRIPTION
#   This file was derived from Paul Centore's:
#       https://www.munsellcolourscienceforpainters.com/MunsellResources/SpectralReflectancesOf2007MunsellBookOfColorGlossy.txt
#   This file contains the notations of the chromatic colors in  X-Rite's 2007 Munsell Book of Color (Glossy Finish).
#   Spectral measurements were made in 2012 with a ColorMunki spectrophotometer, by Paul Centore.
#   There are 1485 chip notations.
# DESCRIPTION ENDS HERE
